raw_text: SpiceDB's SPICEDB_DATASTORE_CONN_URI is leaked on startup logs ### Impact When SpiceDB starts with log level `info`, the startup `"configuration"` log will include the full datastore DSN, including the plaintext password, inside `DatastoreConfig.URI`. ### Patches v1.51.1 ### Workarounds Change the log level to `warn` or `error`.
